final:
module SRAM_Cell (
    input [3:0] data_in,
    input we,
    input clk,
    output reg [3:0] q
);
      wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge dbg_halt) begin
        if (we) begin
            q <= data_in; // Store data
        end
    end
endmodule
